files_changed.notes: Adds one new top-level test function (TestExactBoundarySegmentRolloverResume) after TestOpenWriterResumesExistingSegments. No existing test function modified, no helper signatures changed. Reuses existing package-internal test helpers (listSegmentFiles, segmentPath) and unexported constants (recordHeaderSize) already visible to the _test.go file in-package.

blast_radius: Confined to engine/wal package's test binary. No production code path changes, no public API changes, no other package depends on writer_test.go. Zero risk of affecting engine/catalog, engine/btree, engine/graph, engine/rpc, or agents/ which are being touched by concurrently-running agents on issues #43/#50/#53 (none of which touch engine/wal/).
concurrency_note: Sibling subtask 4.5.14.3 is being implemented concurrently in the same working tree, touching engine/wal/checkpoint_test.go -- a different file. No overlap expected. Sibling subtask 4.5.14.1 (writer.go doc-comment) already landed at commit 9774beebd979a17c39d63513bcd2e53f0d61d872 and did not touch writer_test.go.
backward_compatibility: N/A -- test-only addition, no behavioral or API change to reviewers/callers.
rollback: Single git revert of this commit fully removes the added test with no other side effects.
